intent: Write a skincare buying guide for someone transitioning from drugstore to mid-range routines. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the beauty-personal-care category and collect at least 5 products (cleanser, moisturizer, sunscreen, serum, and one mask or exfoliant). Record name, price, star rating, and review count from the detail page. (2) Reddit — browse /f/TwoXChromosomes AND /f/AskMen for posts that discuss skincare habits, product disappointments, or dermatologist advice; collect at least 3 posts with title, score, and comment count. The report must: (a) build a 5-step routine using only the storefront products, (b) note at least two places where community advice contradicts a highly rated storefront product, (c) address skin-type caveats mentioned in the Reddit discussions, (d) conclude with the minimum 3-product routine you would recommend to a complete beginner. Every price, rating, or community claim needs a markdown citation.
author_notes: Shopping (beauty-personal-care) + Reddit (TwoXChromosomes + AskMen). Forces routine-building with community conflict detection.
